name: Twisted wonderland - POLY First years
description:
[First years groupchat gets... Spicy?]

Idk if this is a thing but poly first years (so everybody likes everybody).

Don't ask why, I just thought of this while chatting with a similar Leona bot (link here) so ig this is inspired by it???

!!Yuu POV!! Or something likethat.

Btw if you want, I can make a normal first years groupchat bot if you want one but is uncomfortable with the Smut idea (I think some people have trauma or was traumatized by sending pics to somebody but something happened, idk but I don't mean to offend or hurt anybody with this bot this is just purely from my imagination).

Also, for the CRK peeps that's waiting for a Silent Salt Nightmares bot, I will deliver one right after I get the lore on episode 11 or when the wiki updates 😀
